case_title: LAI, HILDA Y. vs. PENDER, WADE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENDER, WADE PLTF. TO HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT WADE PENDER FOR $3,055.00 FOR PAST DUE RENT FOR 2/93, 3/93, 5/93, 6/93 AND 7/93. RENT FOR 7/93 SHALL BE PAID BY 5 P.M. ON 7/8/93. IF DEFENDANT CAN PROVE HE PAID RENT FOR 2/93 AND 3/93, PLTF. TO GIVE HIM CREDIT FOR EACH OF THESE MONTHS. DEFT TO PAY $400.00 PER MONTH ON RENT ARREARAGES BEGINNING 8/1/93 AND ON THE FIRST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER. RENT OWED TO PLTF. TO BEAR INTEREST AT 7% PER ANNUM FROM THE DATE IT BECAME DUE. EACH $400.00 PAYMENT TO BE APPLIED TO ACCRUED INTEREST FIRST AND THEN TO THE PRINCIPAL. ATTORNEY FEES AND COST WAIVED IF DEFT. COMPLIES WITH TERMS OF JUDGMENT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENDER, WADE PLTF. TO HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT WADE PENDER FOR $3,055.00 FOR PAST DUE RENT FOR 2/93, 3/93, 5/93, 6/93 AND 7/93. RENT FOR 7/93 SHALL BE PAID BY 5 P.M. ON 7/8/93. IF DEFENDANT CAN PROVE HE PAID RENT FOR 2/93 AND 3/93, PLTF. TO GIVE HIM CREDIT FOR EACH OF THESE MONTHS. DEFT TO PAY $400.00 PER MONTH ON RENT ARREARAGES BEGINNING 8/1/93 AND ON THE FIRST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER. RENT OWED TO PLTF. TO BEAR INTEREST AT 75 PER ANNUM FROM THE DATE IT BECAME DUE. EACH $400.00 PAYMENT TO BE APPLIED TO ACCRUED INTEREST FIRST AND THEN TO THE PRINCIPAL. ATTORNEY FEES AND COST WAIVED IF DEFT. COMPLIES WITH TERMS OF JUDGMENT.
